title: Partial index causes row to not be fetched
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, NULL, 3.14);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1(c1) WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (t1.c2 IS NULL) IS FALSE;
SELECT (t1.c2 IS NULL) IS FALSE FROM t1;
key_bug_features: Partial index on NULL values prevents row fetching
